root_text.an4.156:1.3: Yadā, bhikkhave, kappo saṁvaṭṭati, taṁ na sukaraṁ saṅkhātuṁ—
root_text.an4.156:1.4: ettakāni vassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatānīti vā, ettakāni vassasahassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatasahassānīti vā.
root_text.an4.156:2.1: Yadā, bhikkhave, kappo saṁvaṭṭo tiṭṭhati, taṁ na sukaraṁ saṅkhātuṁ—
root_text.an4.156:2.2: ettakāni vassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatānīti vā, ettakāni vassasahassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatasahassānīti vā.
root_text.an4.156:3.1: Yadā, bhikkhave, kappo vivaṭṭati, taṁ na sukaraṁ saṅkhātuṁ—
root_text.an4.156:3.2: ettakāni vassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatānīti vā, ettakāni vassasahassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatasahassānīti vā.
root_text.an4.156:4.1: Yadā, bhikkhave, kappo vivaṭṭo tiṭṭhati, taṁ na sukaraṁ saṅkhātuṁ—
root_text.an4.156:4.2: ettakāni vassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatānīti vā, ettakāni vassasahassānīti vā, ettakāni vassasatasahassānīti vā.
root_text.an4.156:4.3: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, cattāri kappassa asaṅkhyeyyānī”ti.

translation_text.an4.156:1.1: “Mendicants, an eon contains four uncountable periods.
translation_text.an4.156:1.3: When an eon contracts, it’s not easy to calculate
translation_text.an4.156:1.4: how many years, how many hundreds or thousands or hundreds of thousands of years it takes.
translation_text.an4.156:2.1: When an eon remains fully contracted, it’s not easy to calculate
translation_text.an4.156:2.2: how many years, how many hundreds or thousands or hundreds of thousands of years it takes.
translation_text.an4.156:3.1: When an eon expands, it’s not easy to calculate
translation_text.an4.156:3.2: how many years, how many hundreds or thousands or hundreds of thousands of years it takes.
translation_text.an4.156:4.1: When an eon remains fully expanded, it’s not easy to calculate
translation_text.an4.156:4.2: how many years, how many hundreds or thousands or hundreds of thousands of years it takes.
translation_text.an4.156:4.3: These are the four uncountable periods of an eon.”
